note: 55 kartu tambahan → total 180. 11 per Dominion (4C/3U/2R/1E/1L). Legendary = para First Caller (lore). Digabung ke set01_full.json.

cards.name: Sylvan Saplings
cards.text: When {name} enters, add 1 Verdance Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: The Grove counts its children in thousands.

cards.name: Bloomcaller
cards.text: When {name} enters, restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: She sings, and the wounds forget themselves.

cards.name: Bramblewolf
cards.text: Intercept.
cards.flavor: Its coat is thorns. Its patience is winter.

cards.name: Wildgrowth
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target Unit.
cards.flavor: A season, hurried.

cards.name: Thornback Ravager
cards.text: Rampage.
cards.flavor: It does not stop at the fence. It does not notice the fence.

cards.name: Sylvan Blessing
cards.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target Unit.
cards.flavor: Thornmaw's favor is heavy to carry, and worth the weight.

cards.name: Grovemother's Gift
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Add 1 Verdance Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: The oldest roots remember every name the forest ever held.

cards.name: Ancient of Roots
cards.text: Intercept. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: It kneels for no fire and bows to no crown.

cards.name: Verdant Cataclysm
cards.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on each Unit you control. Restore 4 Health to you.
cards.flavor: One spring, a hundred years wide.

cards.name: The World-Oak
cards.text: Intercept, Rampage. When {name} enters, put a +2/+2 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: Beneath its roots sleeps the emerald Shard. Above them sleeps the world.

cards.name: Elowen, the First Root
cards.text: Alert, Intercept. When {name} enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control and restore 3 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The first of five to bind a Shard. She gave her voice to the roots, and the roots have not stopped grieving.

cards.name: Ashmar Whelp
cards.text: Rush.
cards.flavor: Born from a spark, dead by the second sunrise, glorious in between.

cards.name: Coalfist Brawler
cards.flavor: Ashmar settles arguments the honest way.

cards.name: Scorch
cards.text: Deal 1 damage to any target. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: A love letter, briefly.

cards.name: Emberkin Zealot
cards.text: Rush.
cards.flavor: "The forge is dying and you would have me wait?"

cards.name: Cinderstorm Rider
cards.text: Rush, Swiftstrike.
cards.flavor: The ash parts for her, or it burns with the rest.

cards.name: Pyre Rite
cards.text: Deal 3 damage to any target. Add 1 Pyre Aether this turn.
cards.flavor: Ashmar prays with kindling.

cards.name: Forgeborn Colossus
cards.text: Rush.
cards.flavor: Struck from the last of the forge's true heat.

cards.name: Meteor Strike
cards.text: Deal 6 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: The sky repays a debt no one remembers owing.

cards.name: Inferno Herald
cards.text: Swiftstrike. When {name} enters, deal 2 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: It announces the fire by being the fire.

cards.name: The Sun-Forge Avatar
cards.text: Rush, Rampage. When {name} enters, deal 3 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: The forge given legs. It does not know it is a wound.

cards.name: Vaelan, the First Flame
cards.text: Rush, Swiftstrike. When {name} enters, deal 4 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: He fed his own warmth into the crimson seal, and Ashmar has been cold at heart ever since.

cards.name: Reef Drifter
cards.text: Soar.
cards.flavor: It rides the high currents where sea forgets to be sea.

cards.name: Meridine Cartographer
cards.text: When {name} enters, draw a card.
cards.flavor: He maps the pages the Archive pretends it never had.

cards.name: Ripple
cards.text: Draw a card. Restore 1 Health to you.
cards.flavor: Small knowledge, gently kept.

cards.name: Coral Sentinel
cards.text: Intercept.
cards.flavor: Grown to a purpose it will never be told.

cards.name: Tidal Scholar
cards.text: When {name} enters, draw a card. Target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: For every truth she learns, she chooses one for you to lose.

cards.name: Backwash
cards.text: Return target Unit to its owner's hand. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The tide takes back what it lent, with interest in salt.

cards.name: Deepwater Oracle
cards.text: When {name} enters, draw 2 cards.
cards.flavor: She reads the deep the way others read a face.

cards.name: Leviathan's Call
cards.text: Return all enemy Units to their owner's hand. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: Something vast turned over in its sleep, and the shore was rearranged.

cards.name: Frostwake Serpent
cards.text: Aegis 1.
cards.flavor: Cold as the vault where truth is drowned.

cards.name: The Immutable Codex
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Restore 3 Health to you. This spell can't be countered.
cards.flavor: Everything true is written here. So little of it is allowed to stay.

cards.name: Meridia, the First Tide
cards.text: Aegis 2. When {name} enters, draw 2 cards and return target enemy Unit to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: She poured her memory into the sea so the sea would remember what mortals must not.

cards.name: Dawn Acolyte
cards.text: When {name} enters, restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: First to the wall at first light.

cards.name: Gilded Footman
cards.flavor: The Concord issues armor, oaths, and questions it forbids you to ask.

cards.name: Warding Light
cards.text: Restore 3 Health to you. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The dawn keeps its own counsel and shares only warmth.

cards.name: Shieldwing Cleric
cards.text: Soar.
cards.flavor: Its halo is small. Its silence is not.

cards.name: Lightsworn Paladin
cards.text: Leech.
cards.flavor: Every wound she gives feels, to her, like forgiveness.

cards.name: Sanctify
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Unit you control.
cards.flavor: Blessed be the ranks, and blind.

cards.name: Aurelian Confessor
cards.text: Alert. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: He hears every sin but the Concord's own.

cards.name: Pillar of Judgment
cards.text: Destroy target Unit.
cards.flavor: Light does not argue. Light arrives.

cards.name: Seraph of the Wall
cards.text: Soar, Alert.
cards.flavor: It has guarded the same door for a thousand years and forgotten what is behind it.

cards.name: The Hollow Halo
cards.text: Destroy all enemy Units. Restore 5 Health to you.
cards.flavor: The lock, and the light that hides it are one and the same.

cards.name: Auriel, the First Dawn
cards.text: Soar, Leech, Alert. When {name} enters, restore 4 Health to you and put a +1/+1 counter on each other Unit you control.
cards.flavor: She shaped the mercy of a god into a guardian, then made herself forget she had. Seraphel wears her face and her forgetting both.

cards.name: Gravecrawler
cards.flavor: Nyxhollow does not bury its workers. It reassigns them.

cards.name: Shadow Adder
cards.text: Venom.
cards.flavor: One touch is a full conversation.

cards.name: Dark Bargain
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. {name} deals 2 damage to you.
cards.flavor: The Hollow always pays. You simply may not like the coin.

cards.name: Corpselight Wisp
cards.text: Soar.
cards.flavor: Follow it and you will not be lonely. You will not be anything.

cards.name: Rot Weaver
cards.text: Venom. When {name} enters, target opponent discards a card.
cards.flavor: It spins with what it takes from you.

cards.name: Drain Life
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to any target. Restore 2 Health to you.
cards.flavor: What leaves you does not vanish. It changes hands.

cards.name: Duskveil Executioner
cards.text: Dread.
cards.flavor: Ravenna's law is quiet, and it always comes to visit.

cards.name: Annihilate
cards.text: Destroy target Unit. Draw a card.
cards.flavor: The Hollow keeps a ledger. This is a line being closed.

cards.name: Wraithlord
cards.text: Venom, Dread.
cards.flavor: It remembers a name. It suspects the name was once its own.

cards.name: The Heartshard Whispers
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Target opponent discards 2 cards. {name} deals 3 damage to you.
cards.flavor: "Come closer. We have so much of you to give back." — the Voice

cards.name: Nyxara, the First Dark
cards.text: Dread, Venom, Leech. When {name} enters, target opponent discards 2 cards and {name} deals 3 damage to any target.
cards.flavor: The first First Caller, and the only one still breathing. Ravenna took her name and her thankless watch when the world forgot to.
